title: Mancro Breastmilk Cooler Bag Fits 6 Baby Bottles with Ice Pack & Shoulder Strap, Baby Bottle Cooler Bag Insulated Small Cooler Lunch Bag for Daycare Nursing Mom Travel Picnic Fruits Drinks, Black
features: COMPACT SIZE: This baby bottle cooler bag measures 8.66'' x 8.66'' x 7'' (L x H x W) / 22 x 22 x 18 cm, which can fit 9 ounce (270ml) baby bottles and 330ml drink cans and up to 6, always keep your milk or drink cool. The size is also perfectly working as a lunch bag to store lunch boxes, which is convenient for you take lunch to work, always keep your lunch fresh.

GREAT INSULATION: This breastmilk cooler bag consists of 3 layers (water resistant polyester outer layer, PE foam middle layer and leakproof insulated inner layer), which ensure constant temperature for keeping breast milk, pumped milk, foods or fruits cool and fresh for a long time (up to 8 hours).

PRACTICAL DESIGN: The top handle with detachable buckle makes it easy to attach the insulated bottle bag on the pram or stroller. Also the cooler bag comes with detachable shoulder strap for you to carry on the go. Dual zippers to conveniently open and close. Perfect for storing pumped milk at daycare, home, busy work, plane travel.

ICE PACK INCLUDED: This cooler bag with ice packs can better cool milks and drinks better. The blue ice pack is to help keeping the temperature cool for a long time. (Kind note: Please refer to the usage steps in the package)
WATERPROOF & LEAKPROOF MATERIAL: This cooler lunch bag is easy to clean and made of polyester fabric, which makes outer material waterproof, and inner material leakproof.
description: Product Description Mancro Baby Bottle Bag with Ice Pack for Breastmilk Cooling 1. About the Cooler Bag: 8.5L Compact Capacity: Breast Milk Cooler Bag measured 22 x 22 x 18 cm. Fits 6 feeding bottles 7Oz to 9Oz , or 6 cans of 330ml drink. Package includes: 1 x Insulated Cooler Bag ; 1 x Shoulder Strap; 1 x Ice Pack; 1 x Instruction 2. About the Ice Pack: Adding enough water to the ice pack. [NOTE: Don't exceed the "Max" standard line (about 450ml).] No need to refill water in the ice pack for next use, just refreeze the ice sheet again, then you are good to go. Detail of the Baby Bottle Cooler Bag Breastmilk cooler bag perfectly fits 6 nursing bottles. Dual zippers to smoothly open and close. Detachable buckle to conveniently attach the milk cooler bag on the pram or stroller. Work As Picnic Lunch Cooler Bag Insulated material keeps drinks, bottles, foods cool or warm, and fresh always. Spacious enough to store 6 cans of coke (330ml), or sandwiches, salad, snacks, fruits for Outdoor, Camping, Barbecue, Travel or Short Trip. Comfortable buckle handle and shoulder strap design, Easy to carry and take out. Enjoy family time together. Suitable for Working Mother The breastmilk cooler bag is friendly for working mom to take care of baby and nursing baby better. Compact Size to Carry Conveniently The bottle cooler bag can be attached with shoulder strap, which can be carried over one's shoulder or at one's side. Easily Attach to the Pram or Stroller The top handle with detachable buckle makes it easy to attach the baby bottle cooler bag on the pram or to the stroller. Great Gift Choice Gift for Wife, for New parents. Perfect to store breastmilk, pumped milk.
